# ENCRYPTED Musk Advisor v3 (English)

This file is encrypted. To decrypt, send this content to the AI assistant with your license key.

## How to use:
1. Copy the content below (after the line ---ENC---
2. Send it to the AI assistant with your key:
```
My key is: sk_musk_v3_en_your_key_here

[Paste the encrypted content here]
```
